15.gl: properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated)
15.kj: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore),

15.gl: to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel
15.kj: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

15.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
15.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
15.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));
